历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17187 → 16211 → 18728 → 16928 → 20541, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 20541, the highest ranking in the last 5 years (largest number), indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 26 from 2022 to 2025, and 26 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 77th, with recent rankings stable in the 72–81 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; in 2024, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incident), with no major new reputation signals in 2025–2026; Douyin heat total ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, no obvious signs of increased application attention; no historical abnormal admission records; Chemistry is an A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at Fuzhou University, directly related to majors such as Chemistry and Chemical Engineering and Technology in the enrollment, but overall disciplinary strength is relatively weak among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Vehicle Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering, and Sustainable Energy are popular engineering directions with high social heat; Chemistry and Chemical Engineering and Technology belong to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories, with obvious social discouragement; Civil Engineering is a clearly discouraged direction; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, estimated at about 140,000 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 70%, basically unchanged from 143,000 in 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 367 points, stable in the 360–368 range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, far from Liaoning Province, with some regional preference impact for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 3.2% (2024 data), at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the basically stable scale of provincial candidates, the slightly negative but no major public opinion impact on the university's reputation, and limited advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 20541; the predicted minimum ranking is about 20641, with a range of 20141–21141.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20141–21141, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors can be attempted but have a low admission probability, and Tier 3 majors can serve as a safety net. Chemistry is the only A- discipline at Fuzhou University, although it belongs to the discouraged biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories, its disciplinary strength is outstanding, suitable for candidates with a clear interest in chemistry. Majors such as Civil Engineering and Safety Engineering have relatively lower ranking thresholds and can be considered as stable choices.
